CREATE TABLE synonyms_plain (word String, synonyms String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO synonyms_plain VALUES ('happy', 'joyful cheerful'), ('sad', 'unhappy sorrowful'), ('fast', 'quick speedy');
CREATE TABLE synonyms_wordnet (word String, synonyms String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO synonyms_wordnet VALUES ('good', 'beneficial virtuous'), ('bad', 'evil harmful'), ('bright', 'shining radiant');
SELECT s1.word, s1.synonyms FROM synonyms_plain AS s1 JOIN synonyms_wordnet AS s2 ON s1.word = 'happy' WHERE s2.word = 'good';
SELECT DISTINCT synonyms('plain', 'fast') FROM (SELECT word FROM synonyms_plain WHERE synonyms LIKE '%quick%');
SELECT synonyms('plain', 'happy') UNION ALL SELECT synonyms('wordnet', 'good');
CREATE TABLE test_empty (word String, synonyms String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT COUNT(synonyms('plain', word)) AS synonyms_count FROM synonyms_plain WHERE word IN ('happy', 'sad', 'fast');
